content:
Fashion Inspiration: Autumn Hues

I am sad to say good bye to the Summer and all, but Fall is my favorite! Part of the reason I love it is the colors! (Another reason is the BOOTS!) The burgundy, plum, gold, rust and chocolate shades are so rich and wonderful. I was thrilled to have my wedding outside last fall to incorporate all the shades of Autumn in our photos, and I’m looking forward to adding the different hues to my wardrobe this season!

With those colors in mind, it was easy to find picks for my fashion inspiration! ESPECIALLY the boots – the amazing, amazing, almost-the-same-price-as-my-mortgage Manolo Blahnik boots. Love my picks too? Check out where each of the items came from below!

Jersey Dress: H&M

Manolo Blahnik Boots: Neiman Marcus

Infinity Scarf: Nordstrom

Cole Haan Bag: Macy’s

BCBG Belt: Zappos

Chevron Necklace: Katie Crafts

OPI Nail Lacquer in ‘Plugged in Plum’: Amazon

Ahhhh! I can’t wait for sweater dresses, tights and boots! What are you looking forward to most about the Fall? Which item was your fave?
